title: Automate tax for your business
summary:
Learn how to leverage Stripe Tax to automatically calculate and collect the right amount of tax. This video will guide you through how Stripe Tax monitors tax thresholds, manages global registrations, automatically collects the right amount of tax, and simplifies filing and remitting taxes. Get started with Stripe today and make tax calculation and compliance easier.

Chapters:
00:00 Introducing Stripe Tax
00:39 Setting up your tax registrations
01:14 Managing your registrations
01:44 Calculating tax automatically
02:19 Filing with ease

Resources: 
https://docs.stripe.com/tax 
https://stripe.com/guides/tools/sales-tax-calculator 
https://stripe.com/guides/tools/vat-calculator 
https://stripe.com/guides/tools/gst-calculator 

Get started with Stripe: https://stripe.com/register
transcript_html:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PFzV64TjSmo

Introducing Stripe Tax

Hello, this is a walkthrough of Stripe Tax, an all-in-one tax compliance solution that manages tax obligation monitoring, registrations, [music] calculations, collections, and filings. Stripe Tax helps automate global tax compliance from start to finish so you can focus on scaling your business. In this video, we'll cover how Stripe Tax monitors your transactions to highlight which locations to pay attention to, helps manage your global registrations, automatically collects the right amount

of tax, and simplifies filing and remitting taxes. Let's get started. To

Setting up your tax registrations

get started with Tax, tell us where your business is located and what you sell. Tax will immediately begin monitoring your transaction activity. comparing it to local registration thresholds. When you've reached a threshold in a new location, Tax will let you know when you may need to register with the local tax authority. Once you've registered with the local tax authority and have added the registration in the dashboard, [music] Tax will begin collecting taxes in that jurisdiction.

Managing your registrations

Stripe Tax can help manage all your registration needs for you, saving you time and reducing errors. You can use tax to register in the US. Tax also integrates with partners to handle registrations outside the US. Instead of starting from scratch in each jurisdiction, Tax uses your existing [music] business information to streamline the registration process. We'll keep track of all your registrations [music] so you'll have a full view of where you're collecting tax.

Calculating tax automatically

Stripe Tax calculates and collects the right amount of tax [music] based on your customers location and local tax rules, regardless of where you sell or what [music] you sell, whether it's digital products, physical goods, or services. Tax supports over 100 countries [music] and more than 600 product types, handling complex tax rules automatically. Tax integrates seamlessly with your existing Stripe setup, so adding Tax Collection to your checkout, subscriptions, and invoices doesn't require any code changes.

Stripe Tax includes integrations with

Filing with ease

partners to automate the filing process, ensuring your filings are accurate and timely. Tax also provides reports to help you file taxes on your own, with your accountant, or with one of Stripe's preferred partners. Reports break down your tax liability by jurisdiction and time period, giving you what you need for filing. Whether you choose automated filing or handle it yourself, tax ensures you have the accurate data you need. That's an overview of Stripe Tax, a tax compliance solution that helps you manage

everything from monitoring and registration to collection and filing. [music] Create an account or log in to get started.
